title: Ubiquiti AM-M-V5G-Ti, 5GHz, sector antenna Titanium, changeable angle 60°-120°, 15-17dBi
description: AM-M-V5G-Ti airMAX Titanuim Sector Antenna is a 15 - 17dBi Carrier Class 2x2 MIMO (Dual Polarity) Sector Antenna with 60° - 120° beam angle that was designed for 5GHz band and for integrate with Rocket M radios (RocketM sold separately) Adjustable Beamwidth Configuration - Having adjustable beamwidth options enhances scalability and streamlines inventory. The airMAX Titanium Sector may be custom configured for any deployment requiring a 60° , 90° , or 120° sector. Antenna gain changes according to the configured beamwidth 20% increase in performance with PtMP networks Up to 90% performance improvement in a co-location environment Increased durability in harsh weather Every airMAX® Antenna has a built-in Rocketâ¢ mount , so no tools are needed to install the Rocket BaseStation Antenna Rocket protector (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws
